channel.title: Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings
channel.description: Recent content in Devleader.ca on .NET Ramblings

item.title: How to Implement Adapter Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement adapter pattern in C# with a step-by-step guide covering target interfaces, adaptees, object adapters, and dependency injection registration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/09/how-to-implement-adapter-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: Plugin Contracts and Interfaces in C#: Designing Extensible Plugin Systems
item.description: Design stable plugin contracts and interfaces in C# with versioning strategies and NuGet distribution. A practical guide for extensible .NET plugin systems. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/08/plugin-contracts-and-interfaces-in-c-designing-extensible-plugin-systems

item.title: Testing C# Source Generators: A Practical Guide
item.description: Learn how to test C# source generators with .NET 10. Complete guide covering Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Testing, unit tests, snapshot testing with Verify, and CI integration. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/08/testing-c-source-generators-a-practical-guide

item.title: Composite Pattern Best Practices in C#: Code Organization and Maintainability
item.description: Master composite pattern best practices in C# including type safety, child management, recursive operations, and organized tree-based architectures. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/08/composite-pattern-best-practices-in-c-code-organization-and-maintainability

item.title: Plugin Architecture in C#: The Complete Guide to Extensible .NET Applications
item.description: Learn how to implement plugin architecture in C# using modern .NET patterns. Complete guide with AssemblyLoadContext, DI integration, and working code examples. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/07/plugin-architecture-in-c-the-complete-guide-to-extensible-net-applications

item.title: Adapter Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the adapter design pattern in C# with practical examples showing interface conversion, legacy integration, and third-party library wrapping. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/07/adapter-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples

item.title: Azure AI Foundry Agents with Microsoft Agent Framework in C#
item.description: Connect azure ai foundry agents with microsoft agent framework in C# -- learn Azure backend setup, project connections, managed deployment, and cost management. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/06/azure-ai-foundry-agents-with-microsoft-agent-framework-in-c

item.title: C# Source Generators vs Reflection: Which Should You Use?
item.description: Compare C# source generators vs reflection in .NET 10. Understand performance differences, AOT compatibility, and when to choose source generators over runtime reflection. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/06/c-source-generators-vs-reflection-which-should-you-use

item.title: When to Use Composite Pattern in C#: Decision Guide with Examples
item.description: Discover when to use composite pattern in C# with real decision criteria, use case examples, and guidance on when simpler alternatives work better. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/06/when-to-use-composite-pattern-in-c-decision-guide-with-examples

item.title: Have I Finally Moved Away From Visual Studio? - Dev Leader Weekly 134
item.description: Welcome to another issue of Dev Leader Weekly! In this issue, I talk about finally stepping away from Visual Studio after a lifetime of using it, why Copilot CLI clicked for me, and how I'm using Roslyn analyzers as guardrails to stop AI from repeating its own mistakes. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/06/have-i-finally-moved-away-from-visual-studio-dev-leader-weekly-134

item.title: Evaluating AI Agents with Microsoft.Extensions.AI.Evaluation in C#
item.description: Learn evaluating ai agents microsoft extensions ai evaluation in C#. Build LLM-as-judge evaluation harnesses with real .NET code examples for quality testing. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/05/evaluating-ai-agents-with-microsoftextensionsaievaluation-in-c

item.title: Observer Pattern Real-World Example in C#: Complete Implementation
item.description: Build a complete observer pattern real-world example in C# with a stock price monitoring system featuring multiple subscriber types and async notifications. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/05/observer-pattern-realworld-example-in-c-complete-implementation

item.title: Microsoft Agent Framework vs Semantic Kernel: Which to Use in C#
item.description: Compare microsoft agent framework vs semantic kernel in C# with a side-by-side breakdown, feature table, and decision guide to help you choose the right tool. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/04/microsoft-agent-framework-vs-semantic-kernel-which-to-use-in-c

item.title: How to Implement Composite Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: Learn how to implement composite pattern in C# with a step-by-step guide covering component interfaces, leaf nodes, composites, and recursive operations. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/04/how-to-implement-composite-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: C# Source Generator Performance: Measuring and Optimizing Build-Time Impact
item.description: Learn to measure and optimize C# source generator performance in .NET. Covers incremental source generator caching, build-time profiling, and binlog analysis. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/03/c-source-generator-performance-measuring-and-optimizing-buildtime-impact

item.title: Migrating from Semantic Kernel to Microsoft Agent Framework in C#
item.description: A step-by-step guide to migrate semantic kernel microsoft agent framework in C# -- covering API mapping, gotchas, and when migration makes sense. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/03/migrating-from-semantic-kernel-to-microsoft-agent-framework-in-c

item.title: Observer vs Mediator Pattern in C#: Key Differences Explained
item.description: Compare observer vs mediator pattern in C# with side-by-side code examples, key differences explained, and guidance on when to use each. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/03/observer-vs-mediator-pattern-in-c-key-differences-explained

item.title: OpenTelemetry and Observability in Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: Set up microsoft agent framework opentelemetry observability in C# to track token usage, latency, tool calls, and errors in your AI agents. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/02/opentelemetry-and-observability-in-microsoft-agent-framework

item.title: How to Implement Factory Method Pattern in C#: Step-by-Step Guide
item.description: How to implement Factory Method pattern in C#: step-by-step guide with code examples, best practices, and common pitfalls for creational design patterns. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/02/how-to-implement-factory-method-pattern-in-c-stepbystep-guide

item.title: Composite Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the composite design pattern in C# with practical examples showing tree structures, recursive operations, and uniform component handling. Link to article: https://www.devleader.ca/2026/04/02/composite-design-pattern-in-c-complete-guide-with-examples
